category_sources: source_facts.description says Command-line DNS client; official homepage https://dog.ramfield.net/ describes dog-community/doge as a fast, friendly DNS client.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is doge; official homepage notes the command/package may still appear as doge during the rename window.
docs_sources: Official homepage at https://dog.ramfield.net/ includes install, usage, feature, and contribution documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Dj-Codeman/dog_community; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says DNS client; official homepage and README document UDP, TCP, DoH, DoT, and JSON modes.
